response: THE FINAL WEIGHT OF THE FRAME IS EXPRESSED AS \( W_F = W \times (0.98)^N \). TO ACHIEVE THE TARGET ENERGY REDUCTION, ALEX MUST ADD AT LEAST 12 ADVANCED COMPONENTS. CHECK YOUR CLOCK BEFORE DEPARTING TO ENSURE YOU ARE ON TIME. THE CLOCK ON THE WALL SHOWS THAT TIME IS PASSING RAPIDLY. REMEMBER TO GLANCE AT YOUR CLOCK AGAIN DURING THE RIDE TO MONITOR YOUR PROGRESS.
